name: Bone Scintigraphy
description: Technetium-99m bone scan for evaluation of skeletal metastasis and bone pathology

findings.technique: Whole-body bone scintigraphy was performed following IV administration of Tc-99m MDP. SPECT/CT of specific areas was performed for correlation.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Skull
sections.content: The skull demonstrates [no abnormal uptake / symmetric physiologic uptake]. No focal lesion.

sections.name: Spine
sections.content: The cervical, thoracic, and lumbar spine demonstrate [no abnormal uptake / no focal lesions / symmetric uptake]. No pathological fracture.

sections.name: Thorax
sections.content: The ribs and sternum demonstrate [no abnormal uptake / no focal lesions]. No fracture.

sections.name: Pelvis
sections.content: The pelvis demonstrates [no abnormal uptake / symmetric SI joint uptake]. No lytic or blastic lesion.

sections.name: Extremities
sections.content: The long bones demonstrate [no abnormal uptake / no focal lesions]. The joints demonstrate [no abnormal increased uptake / physiologic distribution].

sections.name: Soft Tissues
sections.content: The soft tissues demonstrate [no abnormal soft tissue uptake]. No paraneoplastic syndrome.

impression:
1. Normal whole-body bone scan.
2. No evidence of skeletal metastasis or pathological process.
author: RadReport Templates
